name: Alexander Coin & Pawn
description_short: Alexander Coin & Pawn is a 25+ year-old pawn shop in Des Plaines, Illinois offering collateral-based loans, coin/antique sales, and fast same-day lending with APRs up to 240%.
description_long:
Alexander Coin & Pawn has operated in Des Plaines, Illinois for over 25 years, establishing itself as a full-service pawn shop and collectibles retailer in the Northwest Illinois region. The business operates from a single physical location at 650 Graceland Avenue and markets itself as 'Northwest Illinois #1 Pawn Shop,' focusing on both lending and retail sales of used and rare items.

The company offers pawn loans with flexible terms (minimum 30 days, renewable indefinitely) where customers pledge personal items as collateral. They also buy and sell coins, antiques, musical instruments, electronics, power tools, jewelry, sports equipment, and gold/silver items. Their loan structure includes a maximum APR of 240%, with rates decreasing as loan terms extend—for example, a $50 loan due in 30 days costs $10 in fees (equivalent to 240% APR), while longer terms reduce the effective rate.

Alexander distinguishes itself by maintaining a large inventory of rare and collectible items built over 25+ years, positioning the shop as a destination for collectors seeking one-of-a-kind pieces rather than a transactional quick-cash lender. They emphasize their showroom experience and continuously update their featured items inventory online, appealing to both pawn borrowers and retail buyers seeking specific collectibles.

As a pawn shop, Alexander serves consumers who need immediate cash against collateral but comes with the inherent limitation of maximum legal pawn shop rates (240% APR in Illinois) and the requirement to surrender physical items. This model suits those with valuable possessions but poor credit access, though it is more expensive than conventional personal loans and carries default risk of losing pledged items.
pros: Established 25+ year operating history building a substantial rare collectibles inventory
Same-day loan funding available for customers needing emergency cash
Flexible loan renewal terms—loans can be renewed indefinitely beyond initial 30-day minimum
Wide product inventory (coins, antiques, instruments, electronics, tools, jewelry, gold/silver)
APR decreases with longer loan terms, allowing borrowers to reduce interest costs by extending repayment
Physical showroom in downtown Des Plaines for in-person browsing and negotiation
Dual business model—offers both lending and retail sales for customers seeking collectibles
cons: Maximum APR of 240% on shortest-term loans is expensive compared to personal loans or credit alternatives
Requires surrendering physical collateral with risk of permanent loss if loan defaults
Single physical location limits accessibility for customers outside Des Plaines area
Limited online presence and no apparent e-commerce for remote transactions
Minimum 30-day loan term may not suit customers needing very short-term cash access
best_for: Collectors and hobbyists seeking rare coins, antiques, or musical instruments at retail
Individuals with valuable personal items who need emergency cash and lack traditional credit access
Borrowers willing to pledge collateral in exchange for fast same-day funding
Sellers looking to liquidate used electronics, tools, jewelry, or collectibles for cash
diagnosis: Alexander Coin & Pawn is best for collectors seeking rare items or individuals with valuable possessions who need emergency cash despite poor credit. The primary caveat is the 240% maximum APR on short-term loans and the requirement to surrender physical collateral, making this substantially more expensive than conventional alternatives for those with credit access.
services: Pawn loans (30-day minimum, indefinitely renewable terms)
